commands.docString: Displays all pods across namespaces with their status, restarts, and age
Shows detailed information about deployments across all namespaces

conditions: If any pods are in CrashLoopBackOff status, investigate pod logs
If any pods are in ImagePullBackOff status, check image repository access
If any pods show high restart counts (>5), investigate pod stability
If all pods are Running and healthy, proceed to check services

commands.docString: Lists all services across namespaces with their type, cluster-IP, external-IP, and ports

conditions: If LoadBalancer services show pending external IPs, check cloud provider integration
If ClusterIP services have no endpoints, verify pod selector matches
If all services are properly configured, check specific namespace details

steps.title: Detailed Namespace Investigation
steps.details: Deep dive into specific namespace resources if issues were found

commands.docString: Shows detailed information about all resources in a specific namespace

conditions: All resources are healthy and properly configured
Critical issues found requiring immediate attention
